data.title: Binance Stablecoin Reserves Surge to Record $31 Billion Amid Market Volatility
data.description: According to Whale FUD: Binance’s stablecoin reserves have soared past $31 billion, reaching a new all-time high as traders and institutions increase their holdings in USDT, USDC, and FDUSD.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell Cautious On Rate Cuts Amid Policy Uncertainty
data.description:
According to Odaily, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell stated on Friday that the Fed will not rush to cut interest rates while awaiting clarity on how the policies of U.S. President Donald Trump's new administration will impact the economy. Powell highlighted significant policy changes in trade, immigration, fiscal policy, and regulation, noting the high uncertainty surrounding these changes and their potential effects. He emphasized the importance of distinguishing between signals and noise as the economic outlook evolves, asserting that there is no urgency to act and that the Fed can afford to wait for a clearer picture.

Powell's remarks come during a period of market volatility, with both stock markets and bond yields experiencing declines. This turbulence follows President Trump's announcement of high import tariffs on major trade partners Mexico and Canada, which was later postponed. Despite Powell's assertion that the economy remains in good condition, data suggests a potential slowdown in consumer spending and increased uncertainty among businesses regarding the economic outlook.

Powell also noted that while key indicators remain robust, progress in inflation and employment continues, albeit unevenly.

data.title: U.S. short-term interest rate futures continue to bet on a Fed rate cut in June
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. short-term interest rate futures continue to bet that the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates in June and predict a total of three rate cuts in 2025, after Powell said the Fed does not need to rush to act. (Jin Shi P)

data.title: Scott Bessent calls for halting government Bitcoin sales after Trump’s executive order
data.description:
US Treasury Secretary Bessent called for halting government Bitcoin sales. He insisted that BTC within the U.S. be transferred to treasury-managed vaults. The secretary’s call aligned with Trump’s executive order to create a U.S. BTC reserve.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bessent-halting-govt-bitcoin-sales/

data.title: Fed's Powell: The Fed does not need to rush to adjust interest rates, most long-term inflation expectations remain stable and close to the 2% target
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell said in a speech that the Fed does not need to rush to adjust interest rates. The current labor market is stable and overall in a balanced state. The inflation level is slightly higher than the 2% target, but is gradually approaching the target. Uncertainty about the Trump administration's policies and their economic impact remains high. Some recent inflation expectation surveys and market indicators have risen due to tariffs, and most long-term inflation expectations remain stable, consistent with the 2% target. (Jinshi)

data.title: Fed's Powell: No rush to cut interest rates until impact of Trump's policies becomes clearer
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell said on Friday that he would not rush to cut interest rates before waiting for further clarity on how the policies of the new Trump administration will affect the economy. Powell said: "The new government is implementing major policy changes in four different areas: trade, immigration, fiscal policy and regulation. Uncertainty around these changes and their possible impacts remains high. Our focus is to distinguish signals from noise as the outlook changes. We don't have to rush and we are fully capable of waiting for a clearer outlook." Powell's speech came at a turbulent time when both stocks and bond yields fell, and Trump announced and then postponed high import tariffs on major trading partners Mexico and Canada. Although Powell said the economy "continues to be in good shape," data also showed that consumer spending may slow and businesses and companies are "increased in uncertainty about the economic outlook." Powell added that key indicators remain robust, and progress in continued increases in inflation and employment is continuing, although uneven. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ripple CEO Chris Larsen lost $150M in XRP after LastPass hack
data.description:
An associate of Ripple CEO Chris Larsen used the hacked password manager LastPass to store private keys protecting Larsen's $150M in XRP.
The post Ripple CEO Chris Larsen lost $150M in XRP after LastPass hack appeared first on Protos.
source: https://protos.com/ripple-ceo-chris-larsen-lost-150m-in-xrp-after-lastpass-hack/

data.title: Whale's 20x BTC Short Position Nets $3.15 Million Profit Amid Market Decline
data.description: On March 3, a large BTC trader ("whale") opened a 20x leveraged short position at $95,824.5 on Hyperliquid, betting on a market downturn.The trade initially generated a floating profit of $7.2 million at its peak when BTC dropped to $81,500, though the position remains open.Current Status:The whale’s short position is still active, with a current profit of $3.15 million.The position size is 502.65 BTC (~$45.01 million nominal value).The liquidation price is $102,730, meaning a BTC rally beyond this level would force the position to close at a loss.Whale Adds 1 Million USDC in Margin – Risk Management or Extended Play?Approximately 7 hours ago, the whale injected 1 million USDC into Hyperliquid, likely to:Lower the risk of liquidation if BTC spikes above $100K.Maintain margin requirements to keep the short position open longer.Potentially add to the short position if BTC attempts another rally.
